title: DragonMine
body:
# DragonMine

## Overview
DragonMine transforms the way players interact with one of Minecraft's most coveted treasures - the dragon egg. This lightweight yet powerful plugin allows players to mine dragon eggs directly with pickaxes, just like any regular block. It completely eliminates the frustrating teleportation mechanic, preventing the egg from moving away when clicked or mined, while maintaining game balance and immersion.

## Features

### 🪨 Natural Mining Experience
- Mine dragon eggs with any pickaxe
- Completely prevents teleportation behavior on click
- Works with both left and right-click interactions
- Customizable drop rates
- Optional silk touch requirement
- Compatible with fortune enchantments

### ✨ Immersive Effects
- Custom sound effects when mining
- Stunning particle animations
- Visual feedback that enhances player satisfaction

### ⚙️ Flexible Configuration
- Simple, well-documented config.yml
- Toggle features on/off based on server needs
- Adjust drop chances to match your economy
- Control permissions for different player groups

### 🔒 Complete Permission System
- Fine-grained access control
- Set who can mine dragon eggs
- Separate permissions for administrative commands

### 🌐 Multi-server Compatibility
- Works seamlessly across server versions
- Compatible with major server types (Spigot, Paper, Purpur)
- No conflicts with other popular plugins
- Minimal performance impact

## Why Choose This Plugin?

### For Server Owners
Your players want a more intuitive way to obtain dragon eggs. After defeating the Ender Dragon, they deserve to collect their trophy without frustration. This plugin provides an elegant solution that maintains game balance while enhancing player experience.

### For Players
No more frustration when trying to collect a dragon egg! The teleportation mechanic can be confusing and time-consuming. Now you can simply use your trusty pickaxe to claim your prize.

### For Survival Servers
Create new economies and trading opportunities around dragon eggs. With configurable drop rates, you can make dragon eggs a renewable yet valuable resource, encouraging End exploration without making them too common.

### For Technical Servers
Automate dragon egg collection in your technical builds. Farm designs that were previously impossible are now within reach, opening new avenues for redstone contraptions and automated systems.

## Technical Excellence

Built with performance in mind, this plugin uses event-driven architecture to minimize resource usage. It hooks directly into Minecraft's event system with no polling or unnecessary processes running in the background.

The codebase follows best practices with clean, well-documented code. Updates are thoroughly tested across multiple server versions to ensure reliability and backward compatibility.

## Getting Started

1. Download and place in your plugins folder
2. Restart your server
3. Configure options in config.yml (optional)
4. Start mining dragon eggs!

Default permissions are automatically granted to all players, but you can restrict access using permission plugins if desired.

---

Download now and give your players the ability to mine dragon eggs the way they should have been able to all along!
